title: tectaria oligophylla
intro: Tectaria oligophylla, also known as the Ohi'a fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tectaria oligophylla include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal properties. Tectaria oligophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
